description:
An aerodynamicist is preparing a digital wind tunnel model of the Space Transportation System (STS) to study shockwave interactions during transonic ascent. A proxy Space Shuttle Orbiter model (shuttle_orbiter_proxy.vsp3) is already loaded in OpenVSP. 

Your task is to integrate the External Tank (ET) and Solid Rocket Boosters (SRBs) into this model:
1. Read the 'sts_stack_spec.txt' file on the Desktop for the exact dimensions and spatial coordinates.
2. In OpenVSP, add a new body component (Fuselage, Stack, or BodyOfRevolution) for the External Tank (ET), size it, and position it using the XForm tab according to the specification.
3. Add another body component for the Solid Rocket Booster (SRB), size it, and position it on the right side using the XForm tab.
4. Ensure the configuration has TWO SRBs by either enabling Y-Symmetry for the SRB component, or manually duplicating it to the left side.
5. Save the complete integrated multi-body model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sts_ascent_stack.vsp3.
